title: TestModel_ValidateRequiresBothFields contains a dead assertion branch
evidence: models_test.go:39 — `if !errors.Is(err, nil) {` guards an empty block with only a comment; the meaningful check is the earlier err==nil fatal, so the errors.Is line is dead code
suggestion: Remove the no-op errors.Is block or assert on the specific error message like the sibling tests

title: Health check does not verify database connectivity
evidence: server.go:56 handleHealth returns {status:ok} unconditionally without pinging the DB
suggestion: Optionally run `db.Ping()` in /health so the endpoint reflects real service health

title: PUT /books/{id} uses full-replace semantics with no partial-update support
evidence: server.go:120 handleUpdateBook decodes the whole Book and UPDATEs all columns; omitted year/isbn become zero values
suggestion: Acceptable for PUT; note if PATCH-style partial updates are ever desired

title: Coverage 75.4% — main.go and DB/500 error paths are untested
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.754; main() and the http.StatusInternalServerError branches (e.g. server.go:74,94,148) are not exercised
suggestion: Optional: inject DB errors to cover 500 paths; main() bootstrapping is conventionally left uncovered
